files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "minio-2965-ecosystem-validate-all-spark-and-hadoop-supported-s3-connectors",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "minio: ecosystem: Validate all spark and hadoop supported s3 connectors",
+    "description": "ecosystem: Validate all spark and hadoop supported s3 connectors. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your minio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review minio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant minio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl get configmap -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio\n```\n## Expected behaviour\n\nI want to use spark-shell (v2.0.1) to connect to minio local to read input data and write back output data."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ecosystem: Validate all spark and hadoop supported s3…",
+        "description": "Make PutObject a nop for an object which ends with \"/\" and si\n```yaml\ncom.amazonaws.services.s3.model.AmazonS3Exception: Status Code: 400, AWS Service: Amazon S3, AWS Request ID: null, AWS Error Code: null, AWS Error Message: Bad Request\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm ecosystem: Validate all spark and hadoop… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n minio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Make PutObject a nop for an object which ends with \"/\" and si",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "com.amazonaws.services.s3.model.AmazonS3Exception: Status Code: 400, AWS Service: Amazon S3, AWS Request ID: null, AWS Error Code: null, AWS Error Message: Bad Request",
+        "{ \"bacon\": {\n    \"isCrispy\": true,\n    \"isDelicious\": true,\n    \"isVegan\": false\n    }\n}",
+        "HADOOP_CONF_DIR=/Users/bkarels/hadoop/hadoop-2.7.3/etc/hadoop\nSPARK_LOCAL_IP=\"127.0.0.1\"\nSPARK_MASTER_HOST=\"localhost\"\nSPARK_MASTER_WEBUI_PORT=8080\nSPARK_MASTER_PORT=7077\nSPARK_DAEMON_JAVA_OPTS=\"-Djava.net.preferIPv4Stack=true -Dcom.amazonaws.services.s3.enableV4=true\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "minio",
+      "community",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
